title: Rayen Table Ironing Board Compact Folding Design with Metal Mesh Hanging Print Dimensions: 73.5 x 31.5 cm
features: This tabletop ironing board is designed for those who have limited storage space or limited space and provides a practical and foldable solution.
Equipped with a metal mesh that allows proper steam permeability and ensures optimal ironing results.
With a hanging hook for convenient storage after use, it provides a convenient way to store the ironing board.
The ironing board is equipped with a cover of cotton, foam and sponge to ensure smooth and efficient ironing.
With compact dimensions of 73.5 x 31.5 cm, this table offers a sufficient ironing surface and is easy to store.
description: From the manufacturer Rayen in your house We innovate to make everyday work easier, with products of ironing, wash-drying, ordering, kitchen and bathroom. We identify your needs and offer functional, attractive and quality products, with own personality and that integrate seamlessly into the home. We aim to provide solutions to the various domestic needs by innovating and designing functional products and, in turn, taking care of all the details that give our products great personality and quality. We offer you a wide range of ironing boards, covers and accessories to make ironing your clothes easier. Its elegant and personality designs will color the space where they are located. Our covers made of 100% cotton fit all types of ironing boards and their prints are original and elegant. We take special care of the quality of your materials so that the ironing experience is excellent. They keep your iron and your clothes in good condition offering you a careful ironing to detail. We intend to cover all the needs that you can pose so that ironing is not a heavy and boring task. Our efficient accessories help you avoid clutter, save time and effort and customize your ideal kitchen. With our range of accessories, different decorative styles, you can organize your bathroom to make it a comfortable and well used space. We design efficient products to help you easily clean your home. Everything you need for washing, drying and caring for your clothes. Gain space in your storage furniture with our practical solutions. Our products adapt to your needs and do not require installation.
